name: Light End Sublimation Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>光と昇華の竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ライトエンドサブリメイション・ドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can banish 1 Level 8 Dragon monster from your Extra Deck; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Dragon monsters. During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can make this card lose exactly 500 ATK/DEF, and if you do, that opponent's monster loses 1500 ATK. You can only use each effect of "Light End Sublimation Dragon" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can banish 1 Level 8 Dragon monster from your Extra Deck; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Dragon monsters. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can make this card lose exactly 500 ATK/DEF, and if you do, that opponent's monster loses 1500 ATK. You can only use each effect of "Light End Sublimation Dragon" once per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes from Extra Deck for cost
